name: synapse2
description: MCP server for Docker and SSH host management — exposes flux (Docker/container/compose/host) and scout (SSH exec/filesystem/ZFS/logs) tools across configured infrastructure hosts.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Docker and SSH hosts via flux and scout
interface.longDescription: MCP + CLI server for homelab infrastructure management. The flux tool covers Docker daemon, container lifecycle, host inspection, and Docker Compose operations across configured hosts. The scout tool covers SSH/local host inspection: filesystem reads, process listing, disk usage, ZFS pools/datasets/snapshots, log retrieval (syslog/journal/dmesg/auth), allowlisted command execution, multi-host fan-out, and file transfer. Read actions are safe; write actions (container stop/recreate/exec, compose down/restart/recreate, image build/rmi/prune, scout exec/emit/beam) are destructive and gated behind confirmation.
defaultPrompt: List the running Docker containers on my host and show recent logs for one of them.
Check disk usage and ZFS pool health on my server over SSH.
Show the status of my Docker Compose projects and restart one that is unhealthy.
